user_claim: Customer: Hi, I found new damage on my car after it was parked outside overnight. | Support: Sorry to hear that. It was not there before. | Support: Did anything else break or is it mostly body damage? | Customer: Mostly the rear bumper area. I attached the photo I took this morning.
evidence_standard_met_reason: Evidence standard met. Requirement: The claimed object and relevant part should be visible clearly enough to inspect the claimed condition.
claim_status_justification: The claim is supported by img_1, which clearly shows the rear bumper of the car with visible crushed packaging damage of medium severity, consistent with the reported dent. The inspection evidence meets the required standard, and no contradictions or risk flags were identified. The user's low-risk history with prior accepted car damage claims further reinforces the legitimacy of this submission.
